localRatingResult.rationale: Both CLI requirements meet target after fixing usage-error mapping and repo-relative evaluation status paths/gaps, with focused tests and behavior checks passing.

ratingResult.rationale: Root welcome, help, errors, and next actions are concise and recoverable.
JSON surfaces are explicit, non-interactive input handling is deterministic, and stdout/stderr separation is preserved.
Evaluation commands share the noun/verb grammar and status/write receipts now use consistent repo-relative paths.
The fixed evaluation status output no longer includes machine-varying absolute paths, and report/status behavior is covered by focused tests.

aggregateRatingResult.rationale: Leaf target: aggregate equals local rating. The release-relevant CLI conformance gaps found in this run are fixed and verified.
